lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What stories do you bring from afar?

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: Between the mountains we witnessed the Chicken King invade a mountain fort full of Mount Tinmen.

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: That was his name! CHICKEN KING! By the light, he fought valiantly.

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: He screamed 'Off with their heads' while flailing around with a Halberd...

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: His paltry reign is sadly no more.

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: During our journey we came upon an abandoned house, it was eerily... silent.

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: As we entered the house we were hit by a horrendous smell - it was quite surprising.

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: The entire family was dead but there was not a single mark on them... Makes you think, what could do such a thing?

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: Such a waste... Such a pretty garden.

lines.speaker: Thomdril
lines.text: Not right now... ask me later.
